profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Nusatama Berkah Tbk engages in the manufacturing and fabrication of special vehicles in Indonesia. It offers transportation logistic products, such as concrete mixers, high bed and low bed trailers, manhaulers, moveable curtain trailers, and triple trailer CSL tanks; road sweepers, tyre handlers, and hydraulic umbrella products; and oil and gas products, including truck cranes and vacuum trucks. The company also provides mineral and coal mining comprising dumping and tipping vessels, and side dump trailers, as well as fuel, lube, and water trucks; logging and forestry products consisting of logging pole trailers, short logging trucks, and skeletal logging trailers. In addition, it offers EV ETRAK double cabin, charging piles, BeiBen electric dump truck, and BeiBen pure electric tractors. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Nusatama Berkah Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Reborn Capital.
